query:
UPDATE features
                SET kill_switch_enabled = $1,
                kill_switch_activated_at = $2,
                rollback_scheduled_at = $3,
                active = $4,
                emergency_override_reason = $5,
                emergency_override_expires_at = $6,
                emergency_override_actor_id = $7,
                emergency_override_applied_at = $8
               WHERE id = $9
